settings.enabled_login_help: Show the PoW security challenge inside the Login form.
settings.enabled_signup_help: Show the PoW security challenge inside the Sign Up form.
settings.enabled_forgot_help: Show the PoW security challenge inside the Forgot Password form.
settings.difficulty_help: Higher difficulty makes bots work harder. Level 1 is invisible to humans (under 100 ms). Level 3 may take a few seconds on slow devices.

forum.challenge_not_ready: The security challenge is still in progress or has not been completed. Please wait.

validation.pow_captcha: The security challenge could not be verified. Please try again.
